<?php namespace Barryvdh\Debugbar\Controllers; use Barryvdh\Debugbar\LaravelDebugbar; use Illuminate\Routing\Controller; use Illuminate\Http\Request; use Laravel\Telescope\Telescope; // phpcs:ignoreFile if (class_exists('Illuminate\Routing\Controller')) { class BaseController extends Controller { protected $debugbar; public function __construct(Request $request, LaravelDebugbar $debugbar) { $this->debugbar = $debugbar; if ($request->hasSession()) { $request->session()->reflash(); } $this->middleware(function ($request, $next) { if (class_exists(Telescope::class)) { Telescope::stopRecording(); } return $next($request); }); } } } else { class BaseController { protected $debugbar; public function __construct(Request $request, LaravelDebugbar $debugbar) { $this->debugbar = $debugbar; if ($request->hasSession()) { $request->session()->reflash(); } } } }
